message:
feat(mesh,conformance): epoch tracking, harness peer registration, integration scenarios

Mesh degraded mode epoch support:
- ControlPlaneEnvelope gains epoch_id field for temporal ordering
- InMemoryControlPlaneHandler: internal state restructured with
  epoch_index (HashMap<ZoneId, BTreeMap<u64, Vec<ObjectId>>>) for
  efficient epoch-based replay queries
- list_epochs(zone_id, since_epoch): discover epochs with stored objects
- fetch_epoch(zone_id, epoch_id): retrieve all objects for a specific
  epoch
- gossip.rs + transport.rs: minor enhancements for epoch propagation

Conformance harness enhancements (+190 lines):
- register_all_peers(): auto-registers all running nodes as mutual
  peers with default DeviceProfiles (CPU, memory, latency, power)
- TestMeshNode: mesh_mut(), object_store(), symbol_store() accessors
- SimulatedNetwork::is_partitioned() made public for scenario assertions

Integration scenarios expansion (+909 lines):
- partition_heal_convergence: now announces objects during partition,
  exchanges gossip within connected subset, heals and verifies
  cross-partition convergence with object availability checks
- Additional deterministic scenario infrastructure (test_object_id,
  test_zone helpers)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
